summary: Completed testing of new features: Team logo upload, Shared access API, and Baseball in SchoolDashboard. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend UI verified for Account Settings shared access section and Team Detail logo upload functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Team logo upload endpoint (POST /api/teams/{team_id}/logo/upload) correctly validates file types (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP) and size (5MB max), stores as base64 data URL
Shared access APIs properly implemented: GET/POST /api/admin/shared-access, GET /api/admin/shared-access/received, DELETE /api/admin/shared-access/{id}
Teams and Games list endpoints correctly include shared teams/games with is_shared and shared_from_user_id fields
SchoolDashboard.jsx line 1017 includes baseball option in sport selector: <SelectItem value="baseball">⚾ Baseball</SelectItem>
Baseball game navigation correctly routes to /baseball/:id (SchoolDashboard.jsx line 377-378)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_LogoUploadTeam for logo upload testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Team logo upload accepts PNG/JPG/GIF/WEBP up to 5MB and stores as base64 data URL. Shared access allows users to grant/revoke access to their teams/games/events. Baseball option is available in SchoolDashboard sport selector.

tests: PNG upload returns 200 with base64 data URL
team_logo_upload.frontend_ui: Upload Image button and file input present in Team Detail page

endpoints: GET /api/admin/shared-access - returns list of users with granted access
GET /api/admin/shared-access/received - returns list of accounts user has access to
POST /api/admin/shared-access - grants access by email (404 for non-existent user, 400 for self-grant)
shared_access_api.frontend_ui: Shared Access section in Account Settings with Grant Access button and email input

teams_with_shared_access.notes: Returns both owned and shared teams with is_shared and shared_from_user_id fields

games_with_shared_access.notes: Returns both owned and shared games

playwright_test_results.account_settings_shared_access: PASS - Shared Access section found with Grant Access button
playwright_test_results.team_detail_logo_upload: PASS - Upload Image button and file input found
playwright_test_results.sport_selection: PASS - Basketball, Football, Baseball options visible
